text.autoconfig.betterjop.title: Better JoP Config
text.autoconfig.betterjop.option.removal: Wait for how many ticks before removing projection when there're no canvases in hand
text.autoconfig.betterjop.option.detecti: Choose how to detect the existence of canvases
text.autoconfig.betterjop.option.persist: Save the projection position when exiting the server and automatically restore it the next time you enter
